pittsDescription: Round execution block, with marks on the top for the thumbs and forehead of the victim ; elaborately ornamented all over. On the projection on which the forehead is intended to rest is a double row of cowrie shells, bound round. A band of guilloche pattern, incised, runs round the circle, and the projections for the thumbs of the victim are ornamented with herring-bone pattern. On the sides of the block are three human figures in shields, a leaf-shaped sword, and a trident points relief holding hands ; The shields are ornamented with straight line diaper pattern, and a down. band of the same runs round the top of the edge of the block. Two human arms and hands are on the side, and two boxes or stools are between the human figures. The bottom of the sides is ornamented with a band of The figures are clothed with jackets and skirts. guilloche pattern in relief. The whole is much worn, as if by constant use.
